overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing vehicle driving through Night City's multi-level highway system at dusk. The sequence includes a traffic stop at an intersection with pedestrian crossings, followed by continued driving through overpasses and a tunnel transition.

agents.ego_description: driving on elevated highway following a pink vehicle through the multi-level road system

entered.detail: concrete highway structure with metal railings spanning across the road
tall corporate skyscraper with illuminated signage visible in the distance
red and white striped concrete barriers lining the right side of the road
tall pole with bright overhead lighting illuminating the highway
massive concrete and steel overpass creating partial cover overhead

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway beneath massive concrete overpasses in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The Kang Tao corporate tower is visible in the distance while traffic barriers line the road, and artificial street lighting illuminates the dusk setting.

events.description: vehicle stops abruptly at intersection behind a pink car
pedestrians begin crossing the street in front of the stopped vehicle

agents.ego_description: stopped at intersection waiting for pedestrians to cross the street

notable_agents.action: crossing the street from left to right in front of the stopped vehicle
waiting at the corner near the traffic light pole

entered.detail: vertical traffic signal showing red light mounted on a pole
white and red striped barrier blocking vehicle access to the crosswalk
green illuminated street sign with white text indicating directions
low concrete barrier separating the road from the sidewalk area

segments.scene_description: The vehicle stops at an intersection beneath the highway overpass. Pedestrians cross the street in front of the car while the traffic light remains red, with crosswalk barriers and street signs visible in the artificial lighting.

events.description: accelerating from stop and turning left onto main highway thoroughfare
entering covered section of highway beneath multiple stacked overpasses

agents.ego_description: driving through the highway system passing under multiple overpasses and alongside other vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: massive steel and concrete structure supporting multiple highway levels overhead
overhead gantry signs with green illumination indicating Santo Domingo and other destinations
large factory structure with smokestacks and industrial lighting
raised train tracks running parallel to the highway with support columns

segments.scene_description: Accelerating onto the main highway and driving through a complex interchange of stacked overpasses and underpasses. Road signs indicate directions to Santo Domingo while moderate traffic flows alongside industrial buildings and elevated rail structures.

events.description: approaching tunnel entrance with road signs indicating the transition

agents.ego_description: driving toward tunnel entrance following a white van into the enclosed section

notable_agents.action: white van entering the tunnel ahead of the ego vehicle

entered.detail: dark opening of a vehicular tunnel with concrete framing and red accent panels
large rounded industrial building with metallic exterior and illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Approaching a tunnel entrance beneath the highway infrastructure, following a white van as the surroundings become more enclosed. An industrial dome structure is visible to the left while the road leads into the dark tunnel opening.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed vehicular tunnel with accent lighting

events.description: entering enclosed tunnel with pink-lit concrete walls
exiting tunnel into open area with natural dusk light and tall tower visible

agents.ego_description: driving through the tunnel and emerging to see a distinctive tall tower against the sky

entered.detail: concrete tunnel walls with distinctive pink accent lighting and geometric panels
concrete tunnel walls with distinctive pink accent lighting and geometric panels
overhead fluorescent lighting fixtures illuminating the tunnel interior
massive skyscraper with spire visible through the tunnel exit against the dusk sky

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrow tunnel with distinctive pink accent lighting on the concrete walls. The vehicle emerges from the tunnel to reveal a massive tall tower with a spire against the dusk sky, marking a transition to a new urban district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a multi-level cyberpunk highway system that transitions from an open urban interchange into a neon-lit tunnel and back into a towering city district. It begins on an elevated road beneath massive concrete overpasses, with the Kang Tao corporate tower looming in the distance under the artificial glow of dusk. As the vehicle comes to a halt at a red light, pedestrians cross the street amidst street signs and barriers before the car accelerates back into a complex interchange of stacked overpasses and industrial buildings. The scene then shifts as the road narrows, following a white van past an industrial dome and into the dark mouth of a tunnel. Finally, the camera glides through the tunnel's pink accent lighting and emerges into the open air to reveal a massive spire piercing the dusk sky.
